docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF LOANTOPIA LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ANTHONY PALACIO, RECOVERY REPRESENTATIVE. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY LOANTOPIA LLC AS TO DEFENDANT AMANTE, JUDE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOANTOPIA LLC

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE, DECLARATION OF MIAILING ATTACHED. FEE FOR SERVICE $95.00 SERVED DEC-11-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AMANTE, JUDE
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/9/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
